case_title: TANUWIJAYA, ROBERT vs. OTTUM, DENNIS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANUWIJAYA, ROBERT SERVED MAY-19-2000, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT OTTUM, DENNIS SHEPERD, WILLIAM

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OTTUM, DENNIS SHEPERD, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1010 BUSH ST #4, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANUWIJAYA, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT OTTUM, DENNIS SHEPERD, WILLIAM DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
